title: cynoglossum cristulatum
intro: Cynoglossum cristulatum, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or the sky blue gentian, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum cristulatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its aerial parts are often used in herbal medicine.
